title: AI and markets — reported now.
sections: Anthony, today is Thursday, July sixteenth.
ASML said customers are accelerating capacity plans because demand for advanced chips continues to outpace supply.
ASML raised its twenty twenty-six sales outlook to between thirty-six and forty billion euros.
A study published on arXiv found eleven percent of S and P five hundred companies had deeply integrated AI by twenty twenty-five.
The same arXiv study reports another ten percent of those companies were using AI in production or service delivery.
The Associated Press reports technology shares moved higher as investors responded to strong corporate earnings.
The Associated Press reports higher oil prices are complicating the market outlook by keeping inflation risk elevated.
